_doc: Pre-optimization baseline. Captured before Tier 1 perf fixes. Re-measure after fixes land and store deltas.
buildWarnings: bcryptjs uses Node.js crypto/setImmediate not supported in Edge Runtime (auth.ts via middleware)
knownObservations: Library/archive sit at ~255 kB First Load — they render KindBadge → map-utils → mapbox-gl import; severing this is Tier 1 fix #1
Map routes (587-631 kB) correctly carry the mapbox-gl chunk; expected for those routes only
Leaflet correctly tree-shaken out of all client bundles despite being installed (dead code, safe to remove)
1.6MB single chunk c36f3faa is mapbox-gl JS — only loaded on map routes via dynamic()

changes: Extracted color helpers to src/lib/map-colors.ts; KindBadge no longer transitively imports mapbox-gl
Deleted dead Leaflet code (place-map-view.tsx, place-map-internal.tsx); uninstalled 4 packages; cleaned next.config.js + globals.css
Lazy-loaded UploadDialog, AddPlaceDialog, CommandPalette via next/dynamic + conditional render
tier1FixesApplied.interpretation: Bundle deltas are within build noise (±2 kB). Next.js automatic chunking was already handling these cases. Fixes remain architecturally correct (decouple kind-badge from mapbox-gl, remove dead code, robust to future changes) but did not move First Load JS measurements. Real remaining wins: landing-page image optimization (LCP), hoisting 'use client' off static landing sections, and adding loading.tsx for perceived perf.
